title: Apex Integration
description: A companion mod for the Apex Cobblemon server!
body:
![Server Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d6b8b2297cb1475e200f80933ae97dfa4dae15.png)
### **Apex Cobblemon Integration** ![Discord Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1978d95df43c9cb2f01af72f1e8c9f43a00ed2de.png) [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/apexcobblemon)    ![Heart Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653693cfbfef44fc41cbf349be719da9f33f2f03.png) [**Install Guide**](https://apexcobblemon.com/modpack)    ![Help](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0862cc275b6c3c7b907bc9264945c5b5b08663df.png) [**Wiki**](https://wiki.apexcobblemon.com)

This mod introduces a variety of features designed specifically for the Apex Cobblemon server, and is included in the [Official Apex Cobblemon Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/apex-cobblemon).
## Emoji Suggestions Automatically suggests all unlocked Emojis when typing in chat. ![Emoji Suggestions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8f6689ae14eefd5c873411779cf5ea83df600ff_0.webp)
## Discord Presence Updates your Discord status with your current whereabouts on the server. ![Discord Presence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24835e778c7f27d9a6d9e0b961d102647779ee46.png)
## Modpack Rewards Apex Cobblemon Modpack users receive various benefits while using the latest version of the pack, including a Random Shiny Pokemon, +1% Shiny Spawn Rate, and access to `/kit modpack`. ![Modpack Rewards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6229b0a43d057d4c9b7075f9763e1c348e26ed.png)
